title: Anti-pattern: 修改数据时不创建新对象 (mutation)
description: 修改数据时不创建新对象 (mutation)
content: {"id": "shadow-002", "pattern": "修改数据时不创建新对象 (mutation)", "consequence": "隐藏的副作用，调试困难，并发不安全", "severity": "critical", "detection": "代码中出现直接赋值修改现有对象字段", "prevention": "immutability 铁律: ALWAYS create new objects", "source": "ECC coding-style.md"}
